global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with various abstract shapes and text elements.
global.main_message: Promoting last-minute savings with a call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, large text at the top that reads 'HorizonHop UGC', with a strong contrast against the background.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Medium-sized text at the bottom that reads 'Last-minute savings Flexible booking options', clear and easy to read.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded rectangular button at the bottom that says 'Shop now', designed to stand out.
